Здравствуйте!

Спасибо, что написали нам.

Мы заметили подозрительную активность в учетной записи, из которой вы к нам обратились. Чтобы мы могли помочь вам с другой учетной записью, вам следует написать нам из учетной записи, которая не была скомпрометирована. Пожалуйста, отправьте новый запрос из учетной записи, в которой никогда не было никаких подозрительных действий.

Если хотите, мы также поможем вам обеспечить безопасность учетной записи, из которой вы нам сейчас пишете. Как бы вы хотели поступить дальше?

Ждем вашего ответа.

С уважением,

Bonjour, 

Merci de nous avoir contactés.

Nous avons remarqué une activité suspecte sur le compte à partir duquel vous nous avez contactés. Afin de vous aider avec l'autre compte, nous devons nous assurer que le compte à partir duquel vous nous contactez n'a jamais été piraté. Veuillez soumettre une nouvelle demande à partir d'un compte existant ou nouveau qui n'a fait l'objet d'aucune activité suspecte.

Si vous le souhaitez, nous pouvons également vous aider à sécuriser le compte à partir duquel vous nous contactez actuellement. Quelle option préférez-vous choisir ?

Nous avons hâte de recevoir votre réponse.

À bientôt !
Update CIF and send to the check BOT

the SC official statement: is only available in EN - So, I will apologize and explain to the player and suggest using some translation tool

Hello there, here's Juan  

Thank you for contacting us!  

We would like to inform you that it is no longer possible to transfer purchases from Squad Busters to any other Supercell games. This option was available only until December 31, 2025, and after that date transfers are no longer supported. We sincerely thank you for having played Squad Busters and, above all, for continuing to be part of the Supercell community. Your support means a lot to us.  

Hope that helps.  

Best regards, Juan

Native PT/ES Speaker | Lemu

Duplicate interaction
Handling in this ticket:
Issue:

Hi, I'm Juan.

Thank you for contacting us!


To continue resolving your billing issue in Hay Day, we need you to provide the following:

Information about your purchase details to confirm it: Here's a list of the items purchased and their quantities, for example:

• Diamonds x100
• Coins x50,000
• Boosters x3
• Decorations x1

Additionally, we need to locate your order in our system. Please send us a copy of the purchase receipt or the transaction ID number. You can find this information in the following ways:

• Open the email account used for the purchase and look in your inbox for "Your Google Play Order Receipt."

• Select the relevant order on the Google Payments transaction page. The transaction ID usually follows one of these formats:
• GPB.123456789012345
• GPA.1234-5678-9012-34567

Thank you very much for your cooperation and understanding.

I hope this is helpful.

Best regards, Juan

Hello Player, this is Juan from Supercell.

Thank you for contacting us.

To help you with your account recovery or verification request, we need some important information to properly identify your account. Please include the following information in your reply:

- Exact account name as it appears in the game
- Player tag (for example, #ABC123XYZ)
- Current trophy count (only for Clash of Clans, Clash Royale, or Brawl Stars)
- Experience level (only for Boom Beach or Hay Day)
- Previous email address linked to the account or one you remember using
- Screenshots clearly showing the account name and tag
- If you made purchases on the account, please attach a screenshot of the receipt or proof of payment.

With this information, we can review your case more accurately. We appreciate your cooperation and patience while we work to help you.

Juan from Supercell

Hola jugador, soy Juan de Supercell

Gracias por tu mensaje.

Sintiéndolo mucho, no hemos podido confirmar tu titularidad de esta cuenta, por lo que no podemos recuperarla.

Sin embargo, puedes probar los siguientes pasos para intentar recuperar el acceso:

Si usabas un dispositivo Apple Te recomendamos contactar con el soporte oficial de Apple para la recuperación de cuentas: https://support.apple.com/es-es/HT201232

Si usabas una cuenta de Google Puedes acceder al soporte de recuperación de cuentas de Google desde el siguiente enlace: https://support.google.com/accounts/answer/7682439?hl=es

Si aún tienes acceso a un dispositivo más antiguo, Por favor, intenta contactarnos desde ese dispositivo. Esto puede ayudarnos a verificar tu información de forma más precisa.

Si tienes otra cuenta con la que jugaste al mismo tiempo Te pedimos que nos contactes desde esa cuenta. Esto puede facilitar el proceso de verificación y ayudarnos a entender mejor tu situación.

Gracias por tu comprensión.

¡Saludos!

Hola, soy Juan de Supercell.

Gracias por contactarnos.

Para ayudarte con la recuperación o verificación de tu cuenta, necesitamos información importante para identificarla correctamente. Por favor, incluye la siguiente información en tu respuesta:

- Nombre exacto de la cuenta tal como aparece en el juego

- Etiqueta de jugador (por ejemplo, #ABC123XYZ)

- Número actual de trofeos (solo para Clash of Clans, Clash Royale o Brawl Stars)

- Nivel de experiencia (solo para Boom Beach o Hay Day)

- Dirección de correo electrónico anterior vinculada a la cuenta o una que recuerdes haber usado

- Capturas de pantalla que muestren claramente el nombre y la etiqueta de la cuenta

- Si realizaste compras con la cuenta, adjunta una captura de pantalla del recibo o comprobante de pago.

Con esta información, podremos revisar tu caso con mayor precisión. Agradecemos tu cooperación y paciencia mientras trabajamos para ayudarte.

Juan de Supercell
Important note: I will not take U13 actions under the RA because the player mentioned, "I'm a legal tutor," and the player is using the BOT's option and the account is regular

Hello player, this is Juan from Supercell

Thank you for your message.

Unfortunately, we have not been able to confirm ownership of this account, so we are unable to recover it at this time.

However, you may try the following steps to regain access:

If you were using an Apple device We recommend contacting Apple Support for account recovery: [https://support.apple.com/en-us/HT201232](https://support.apple.com/en-us/HT201232)

If you were using a Google account You can access Google’s account recovery support here: [https://support.google.com/accounts/answer/7682439?hl=en](https://support.google.com/accounts/answer/7682439?hl=en)

If you still have access to an older device Please try reaching out to us from that device. This may help us verify your information more accurately.

If you have another account you played with at the same time Please contact us from that account. This can help us better understand your situation and assist with verification.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards!

I confirm ownership by highlighting that the device originally used to create the account is the same device now contacting us. This direct match between the creation device and the current activity provides strong evidence of legitimate ownership.

Ciao,

grazie per averci contattato!

Abbiamo notato alcune attività sospette sull'account da cui ci hai contattato. Per poterti aiutare con l'altro account, dobbiamo assicurarci che quello da cui ci stai contattando al momento non sia mai stato compromesso, perciò ti chiediamo di inoltrare una nuova richiesta da un account nuovo o già esistente su cui non è stata rilevata alcuna attività sospetta.

Se vuoi, possiamo aiutarti a rendere sicuro quello da cui ci stai contattando, perciò facci sapere come desideri procedere.

Rimaniamo in attesa di un tuo riscontro.

Saluti.

مرحبًا،

نشكرك على مراسلتنا.

قبل أن نعالج استفسارك، نود إبلاغك بأننا رصدنا أنشطة مشبوهة في الحساب الذي تتواصل معنا من خلاله. لأسباب أمنية لا يمكننا المتابعة حتى نقوم بتأمين الحساب المخترق.

هلا تؤكد ما إذا كان بإمكاننا المتابعة لتأمين الحساب المخترق الذي تتواصل معنا منه أم لا؟

في انتظار ردك.

مع أطيب التحيات،

Hello player, this is Juan from Supercell

Thank you for contacting us. 

We've reviewed your case and confirmed that you were unable to claim the Mini P.E.K.K.A. because your account was below the 5,000 trophy requirement (Arena 15) at the start of the season.

Seasonal rewards are only awarded to players who meet the criteria established at the beginning of each cycle, and in this case, it wasn't possible to enable the reward.

We encourage you to keep progressing in your matches to reach new arenas and earn rewards in the future.

Regards, Juan from Supercell

Ciao giocatore, sono Juan di Supercell

Grazie per il tuo messaggio.

Purtroppo non siamo riusciti a confermare la proprietà di questo account, quindi al momento non possiamo recuperarlo.

Tuttavia, puoi provare i seguenti passaggi per riottenere l’accesso:

Se stavi usando un dispositivo Apple  
Ti consigliamo di contattare il Supporto Apple per il recupero dell’account: https://support.apple.com/it-it/HT201232

Se stavi usando un account Google  
Puoi accedere al supporto per il recupero dell’account Google qui: https://support.google.com/accounts/answer/7682439?hl=it

Se hai ancora accesso a un vecchio dispositivo  
Ti invitiamo a contattarci da quel dispositivo. Questo potrebbe aiutarci a verificare le tue informazioni in modo più accurato.

Se hai un altro account con cui giocavi contemporaneamente  
Ti chiediamo di contattarci da quell’account. Questo ci aiuterà a comprendere meglio la tua situazione e a supportarti nella verifica.

Grazie per la tua comprensione.

Cordiali saluti!

Hallo!

Vielen Dank für deine Nachricht.

Wir haben verdächtige Aktivitäten auf dem Konto festgestellt, von dem aus du uns kontaktiert hast. Damit wir dir mit dem anderen Spielkonto helfen können, müssen wir sicherstellen, dass das Konto, mit dem du uns kontaktierst, nicht gefährdet ist. Bitte schicke uns eine neue Anfrage von einem bestehenden oder neuen Spielkonto, das keine verdächtigen Aktivitäten aufweist.

Wenn du möchtest, können wir dir auch dabei behilflich sein, die Sicherheit des Spielkontos zu gewährleisten, von dem aus du uns aktuell kontaktierst. Wie möchtest du fortfahren?

Ich freue mich darauf, wieder von dir zu hören.

Viele Grüße

- Número atual de troféus (apenas para Clash of Clans, Clash Royale ou Brawl Stars)

- Nível de experiência (apenas para Boom Beach ou Hay Day)

- Endereço de e-mail anterior vinculado à conta ou um que você se lembre de ter usado

- Capturas de tela que mostrem claramente o nome e a tag da conta

- Se você fez compras com a conta, anexe uma captura de tela do recibo ou comprovante de pagamento.

Hello, this is Juan.

Thank you for contacting us!

We understand how important it is for you to regain access to your account. However, to help you safely and effectively, it's essential that you contact us directly from the Supercell game in question. This allows us to properly verify the information and protect both your account and your data.

Why is it necessary to contact us from the correct game?

Each Supercell game has its own integrated support system. When you contact us from a game other than the one your account belongs to, we don't have access to the necessary tools to review or modify information related to that account. This includes recovery processes, ownership verification, or any other type of adjustment.

I hope this helps.

Best regards, Juan

Wenn Sie noch Zugriff auf ein älteres Gerät haben, kontaktieren Sie uns bitte über dieses Gerät. Dies kann uns helfen, Ihre Informationen genauer zu überprüfen.

Falls Sie zur gleichen Zeit mit einem anderen Konto gespielt haben, kontaktieren Sie uns bitte über dieses Konto. Dies hilft uns, Ihre Situation besser zu verstehen und die Verifizierung durchzuführen.

Vielen Dank für Ihr Verständnis.

Apple cihazı kullanıyorsanız Hesap kurtarma için Apple’ın resmi desteğine başvurmanızı öneririz: https://support.apple.com/tr-tr/HT201232

Google hesabı kullanıyorsanız Google’ın hesap kurtarma desteğine şu bağlantıdan ulaşabilirsiniz: https://support.google.com/accounts/answer/7682439?hl=tr

Eski bir cihaza hâlâ erişiminiz varsa Lütfen bizimle o cihazdan iletişime geçmeyi deneyin. Bu, bilgilerinizi daha doğru şekilde doğrulamamıza yardımcı olabilir.

Aynı anda oynadığınız başka bir hesabınız varsa Lütfen bizimle o hesaptan iletişime geçin. Bu, doğrulama sürecini kolaylaştırabilir ve durumunuzu daha iyi anlamamıza yardımcı olabilir.

Anlayışınız için teşekkür ederiz.

Saygılarımızla, Juan
We have revoked the item purchased by mistake

Merhaba,

Bizimle iletişime geçtiğiniz için teşekkürler!

Durumunuzu anlıyoruz, ancak bu konu için oyun içinden bizimle iletişime geçmenizi rica ediyoruz. Lütfen aşağıdaki adımları takip edin:

1. Oyunda "Ayarlar" kısmına gidin.
2. "Yardım ve Destek" düğmesine dokunun.
3. Sorununuzla ilgili makaleleri inceleyin.
4. Aradığınız yanıtı bulamıyorsanız ekranın sağ üst köşesindeki mavi mesaj balonuna dokunarak bize mesaj gönderebilirsiniz.

Cihazınız oyun içi Yardım ve Destek özelliğini desteklemiyorsa lütfen başka bir cihaz kullanın veya cihazınızı en son iOS ya da Android sürümüne yükseltin.
